name: Forgot password
description: Standalone /forgot-password route, exercised UNauthenticated via the Spec CI unauth-context lane (metadata.requiresUnauthenticated). Structural-only: asserts the password-reset request form renders — the email input (#email) and the 'Send Reset Email' submit button. No transition is authored: submitting would POST a real password-reset request for the shared ci-bot account, so this spec proves the form's structure without firing it (the safe, deterministic surface).

states.name: Reset-request form
states.description: The forgot-password request form: an email input and the 'Send Reset Email' submit button. Email input matched by its DOM id attribute; the button by role+text.

assertions.description: Send Reset Email submit button is present (matched by role+text).
